name: The Georgia Peachberry No Cook Jam
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure the prepared fruits into a large bowl.
2. Add sugar to the fruit and mix well.
3. Let stand for 10 minutes.
4. Stir in lemon juice and liquid fruit pectin.
5. Continue stirring for 3 minutes until most of the sugar is dissolved.
6. Pour into clean jars or plastic containers.
7. Cover with tight lids and let stand at room temperature until set (may take up to 24 hours).
8. Store in freezer, or for 3 weeks in refrigerator. Makes 4-1/2 cups.
Origin: Reader's Digest, Canadian Edition, June 1993.
Shared by: Sharon Stevens
